ddls:
CREATE TABLE "initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the initiative (e.g., Clean Heat & Cooling) */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "expenditures_plan" REAL /* Planned expenditures for the current year */,
  "expenditures_current" REAL /* Actual expenditures through current quarter */,
  "encumbrances_current_quarter" REAL /* Encumbrances for the current quarter */,
  "total_progress_current_quarter" REAL /* Total progress on expenditures for the current quarter */,
  "total_expected_through_2025" REAL /* Total expected expenditures through 2025 */,
  "total_progress_through_2025" REAL /* Total progress on expenditures through 2025 */,
  "total_expected_through_2030" REAL /* Total expected expenditures through 2030 */,
  "total_progress_through_2030" REAL /* Total progress on expenditures through 2030 */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the initiative */,
  "budget_source" TEXT /* Source of the budget */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiatives_focus_area FOREIGN KEY ("focus_area") REFERENCES focus_areas ("focus_area_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "focus_areas" (
  "focus_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each focus area */,
  "focus_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the focus area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the focus area */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the focus area is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("focus_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure entry */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related initiative */,
  "expenditure_type" TEXT /* Type of expenditure (planned, actual, encumbered) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure entry */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding for the expenditure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encumbrances" (
  "encumbrance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encumbrance entry */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related initiative */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the encumbrance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the encumbrance entry */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding for the encumbrance */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the encumbrance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encumbrance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encumbrances_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress report */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related initiative */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period of the report (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of progress made towards expenditures */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the progress */,
  "financial_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the report pertains to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_financial_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("financial_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the year is the current financial year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "financial_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "current_year" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the financial year is the current one */,
  "is_budgeted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the financial year is budgeted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget forecast */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related initiative */,
  "forecast_year" TEXT /* Year of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_expenditure" REAL /* Forecasted expenditure for the year */,
  "forecasted_progress" REAL /* Forecasted progress percentage */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the forecasted expenditure */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_forecasts_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)
